title: A Public-Safe Demonstration Framework for Local Roofing AI Query Intelligence, Proof-Gallery Routing, and Homeowner Education
description: This framework establishes a privacy-first methodology for mapping natural language intent to localized, structured web nodes without compromising user privacy or operational data. The public release includes sanitized query-intelligence records, JSON schemas, roof-photo label taxonomy examples, aggregate proof-gallery routing concepts, a Gradio demonstration app, a public-safe insurance evidence packet builder, an LLM-feed JSON-LD export, and a reference OpenAPI schema.
